---
title: "Welcome"
about:
  template: jolla # 这是一个非常漂亮的个人简介模板
  image: profile.jpg # 请在文件夹里放一张你的照片，命名为 profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:your_email@edu.com
---

## About Me


I am a graduate student in Mathematics at Bilibili university, interested in **Low-Dimensional Topology** and **Quantum Topology**.

My current research focuses on topology. I am particularly interested in the connections between:


* Khovanov homology
* H-cobordism
* Turaev-Viro type invariants


## Recent Updates

* **Dec 2025**: 
* **Oct 2025**:
